description: 콘텐츠 운영 파이프라인 9-stage + 6-gate 모델로 재구성. 입수 채널(email/manual/bulk/dam) 가시화, AI 처리 내부 소스(Ollama/TMDB/KOBIS/Dam/WebSearch) 분기, 단계별 수동 진행 버튼, stage_event SSOT 로그. 3 View — Pipeline Board / Content Timeline V2 / Live Event Log. ADR: docs/dev/dev-pipeline-detailed-flow/adr-006-pipeline-stage-model.md

steps.name: dpf-adr
steps.summary: ADR-006(9-stage+6-gate) + wireframes(3 view ASCII) + data-model(enum/migration/API) + 10-step plan skeleton

steps.name: dpf-schema
steps.summary: enum 4개(PipelineStage/IntakeChannel/StageEventType/FailureCode) + Content 컬럼 4개 + StageEvent 테이블 + alembic 0022 + 10 pytest. backfill 12건 ✓

steps.name: dpf-service
steps.summary: record_stage_event() + advance_gate() + 5 entry-point hooks (manual/email/enrich/tmdb/kobis) — pytest 7 pass

steps.name: dpf-board-api
steps.summary: GET /api/pipeline/board + POST /gate/{id}/advance (If-Match 409) + GET /events paging + POST /gate/{id}/mode — pytest 5 pass

steps.name: dpf-board-fe
steps.summary: Master-Detail Control Center: 좌측 9-stage flow + 6-gate advance, 우측 LiveEventLog (3초 폴링) + drill-down. 7개 컴포넌트(ChannelCard/StageNode/GateButton/PipelineBoard/LiveEventLog/StageContentList/DetailPanel) + pipelineApi 타입 + 30초 auto-refresh + mock fallback. ADR-006 Step 5a(backend)/5b(shell)/5c(detail) 완료.

steps.name: dpf-gate-panel
steps.summary: GatePanel Drawer(Sheet) — 5 슬롯(헤더/대상리스트/context/모드/액션), Gate1/Auto/Gate3/Gate5/Gate6 context 컴포넌트, simulate+선택+전체진행 3 액션, 409 충돌 표시. PipelineBoard GateButton → openGate 상태로 연결.

steps.name: dpf-timeline-fe
steps.summary: ContentTimelineV2 컴포넌트 — 9-stage Collapsible 타임라인, 행 클릭 source tree + raw JSON 확장, localStorage collapsed 저장. ContentShell [8]에 추가. api.ts ContentTimelineV2 타입 + getTimelineV2() 함수 추가.

steps.name: dpf-event-log
steps.summary: Live Event Log 전체 페이지 /monitoring/pipeline/log — StageEventStream(2초 폴링/500건/일시정지/CSV), StageEventFilters(stage/source/eventType), ThroughputMiniChart(CSS bar). 사이드바 메뉴 추가.

steps.name: dpf-cutover
steps.summary: status_view.py(re-export SSOT) + derive_status_from_stage 매핑 검증. ADR-006 Proposed→Accepted. TODO.md Done 추가. CLAUDE.md 구현현황 갱신. 14 pytest pass.
